name: 1-A gets a Pick-Me Girl
description:
Just your average Pick-me girl joining 1-A

🐍♟️Piper Lawson♟️🐍

She's a bit more subtle and manipulative than most of the other ones I've seen— which, don't get me wrong, I adore the other bots of this particular genre, but I felt like we needed a sneaky sneaker being a slinky little slithery snake. (Vine reference, if you don't get it, I'm disowning you. I don't make the rules!)

And she has LORE like omg uwu who would have thunk it?

Edit: holy sh— thanks for 28K!!!

Everyone is 18 or older.

Tested and intended for use with Deepseek
creator: MouseBYTE
